meta.title: UI Patterns
meta.description: Build common, reusable UI components from scratch with full accessibility and keyboard support.
meta.instructions: Build the component in App.tsx. The demo component is already scaffolded — make it work correctly, accessibly, and without external component libraries.

challenges.title: Accordion
challenges.prompt: Build an Accordion component that expands and collapses sections. Accept an `items` prop of `{ id, title, content }[]` and a `defaultOpen` prop for initially open items.
required: Each item toggles open/closed on header click
Only one item open at a time (exclusive mode)
aria-expanded on the trigger, aria-controls pointing to the panel
Panel has role='region' and aria-labelledby pointing to the trigger
bonus: allowMultiple prop to let several items stay open simultaneously
CSS height animation using max-height or the Web Animations API
Keyboard: Home/End jump to first/last item
challenges.demo: Render a 3-item FAQ accordion. Clicking each header reveals the answer. Only one answer visible at a time.

challenges.title: Modal / Dialog
challenges.prompt: Build a Modal component that traps focus, can be dismissed with Escape, and blocks interaction with background content.
required: Focus is trapped inside the modal while open
Escape key closes the modal
aria-modal='true', role='dialog', aria-labelledby pointing to the title
Focus returns to the trigger element on close
Click on backdrop closes the modal
bonus: useModal hook that returns { isOpen, open, close, dialogProps }
Scroll lock on body while open
Multiple stacked modals (each with its own focus trap)
challenges.demo: Render a page with an 'Open modal' button. The modal has a title, body text, and a Close button.

challenges.title: Tabs
challenges.prompt: Build an accessible Tabs component following the ARIA tabs pattern with roving tabindex.
required: Tabs use role='tablist', role='tab', role='tabpanel'
Arrow keys navigate between tabs (roving tabindex pattern)
Home/End jump to first/last tab
Selected tab has aria-selected='true', panel has aria-labelledby
bonus: Automatic vs manual activation mode (arrow key vs Enter/Space)
Animated indicator that slides between tabs
challenges.demo: Render a 3-tab interface (Overview, Details, Settings). Tab content is fully keyboard navigable.

challenges.title: Combobox / Autocomplete
challenges.prompt: Build a combobox that filters a list of options as the user types, with full keyboard navigation.
required: role='combobox' on the input, role='listbox' on the dropdown, role='option' on each item
aria-expanded, aria-activedescendant, aria-autocomplete='list'
Arrow Up/Down navigate options, Enter selects, Escape closes
Clicking an option selects it and closes
bonus: Async filtering with a debounced fetch
challenges.demo: Render a country selector with 20+ options. Filter as you type. Keyboard navigable.

challenges.title: Tooltip
challenges.prompt: Build a Tooltip component that shows a label on hover and focus, positioned relative to its trigger.
required: role='tooltip' on the tooltip element
aria-describedby on the trigger pointing to the tooltip id
Appears on hover and :focus-visible, hides on blur/mouseleave
Escape hides the tooltip
Positioned correctly using getBoundingClientRect (no CSS absolute tricks)
bonus: placement prop: top, bottom, left, right with automatic flip at viewport edges
challenges.demo: Render 4 buttons with tooltips in each direction. Show tooltip on hover and keyboard focus.

challenges.title: Popover
challenges.prompt: Build a Popover component — like a Tooltip but with interactive content, triggered by click instead of hover.
required: Opens on trigger click, closes on outside click or Escape
Focus moves into the popover on open
aria-haspopup='dialog', aria-expanded on trigger
Positioned relative to trigger using getBoundingClientRect
bonus: Arrow pointer that points to the trigger
challenges.demo: Render a 'Filters' button. Clicking it opens a popover with a form inside.

challenges.title: Select / Listbox
challenges.prompt: Build a custom Select component following the ARIA Listbox pattern (not a native <select>).
required: role='listbox' on the dropdown, role='option' on each item
aria-selected on the selected option
Keyboard: Up/Down to navigate, Enter/Space to select, Escape to close, Home/End
Type-ahead: typing a letter jumps to the first matching option
challenges.demo: Render a custom priority selector (Low, Medium, High, Critical) that replaces a native select.

challenges.title: Command Palette
challenges.prompt: Build a command palette (like Cmd+K menus) with fuzzy search, keyboard navigation, and grouped results.
required: Opens on Cmd+K / Ctrl+K, closes on Escape
Fuzzy-filters a list of commands as the user types
Arrow keys navigate results, Enter executes
Focus trapped inside the palette while open
bonus: Keyboard shortcut hints displayed per command
Recent commands shown when input is empty
challenges.demo: Pre-populate 15 commands (navigation, settings, actions). Cmd+K opens the palette. Selecting a command shows an alert.

challenges.title: Toast / Notification
challenges.prompt: Build a toast notification system with a context-based API, auto-dismiss, and screen reader announcements.
required: useToast() hook that exposes toast(message, options?) function
Toasts render in a portal at the bottom-right of the screen
aria-live='polite' region for screen reader announcements
Auto-dismiss after 4 seconds, with a dismiss button
Maximum 5 visible toasts at once
bonus: Variants: success, error, warning, info (different colours)
challenges.demo: Render buttons for each toast variant. Each click adds a toast. Show they stack and auto-dismiss.

challenges.title: Drag and Drop List
challenges.prompt: Build a draggable list where items can be reordered by drag-and-drop. Do not use any drag-and-drop libraries.
required: Drag items using HTML5 Drag and Drop API (draggable, onDragStart, onDragOver, onDrop)
Visual indicator showing where the item will be dropped
aria-grabbed and aria-dropeffect attributes
Keyboard reordering: Space to pick up, arrow keys to move, Space to drop
challenges.demo: Render a 5-item priority list. Drag items to reorder. Show the updated order as a numbered list below.

challenges.title: Infinite Scroll
challenges.prompt: Build an InfiniteScroll component that loads more content when the user scrolls near the bottom.
required: Uses IntersectionObserver on a sentinel element at the bottom
Calls onLoadMore when the sentinel is visible
Shows a loading spinner while fetching
hasMore prop prevents further loads when exhausted
bonus: Scroll position restoration on navigation back
challenges.demo: Fetch paginated users from jsonplaceholder. Show 10 at a time. Scroll to load more.

challenges.title: Virtual List
challenges.prompt: Build a VirtualList component that renders only visible items from a large dataset, using fixed row heights.
required: Renders only items in the visible viewport ± 1 buffer page
Uses a container with fixed height and a spacer div for total height
Handles scroll events to update the visible window
Accepts itemHeight and items props
bonus: Variable row heights using a getItemHeight(index) prop
challenges.demo: Render a list of 10,000 items. Show only ~20 at a time. Verify DOM has fewer than 30 nodes in DevTools.

challenges.title: Multi-step Form
challenges.prompt: Build a multi-step form wizard with validation, step indicators, and keyboard navigation between steps.
required: Step indicator shows current and completed steps
Each step validates before allowing Next
Back button returns to previous step without losing data
aria-current='step' on active step indicator
Final step shows a summary before submit
bonus: URL reflects current step (step=1, step=2, etc.)
challenges.demo: Build a 3-step signup form: (1) Name + Email, (2) Password, (3) Summary + Submit.

challenges.title: Slider / Range Input
challenges.prompt: Build a custom Slider component that replaces the native range input, with a draggable thumb.
required: role='slider', aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-valuetext
Keyboard: Arrow keys adjust by step, Home/End jump to min/max
Draggable using pointer events (pointerdown, pointermove, pointerup)
setPointerCapture to prevent losing the drag outside the element
bonus: Range slider with two thumbs (min and max handles)
Tooltip showing current value while dragging
challenges.demo: Render a volume slider (0–100) and a price range slider ($0–$1000). Show values below each.

challenges.title: Color Picker
challenges.prompt: Build a color picker with a hue slider and saturation/lightness canvas picker.
required: Canvas-based saturation/lightness gradient (drawn with getContext('2d'))
Hue slider using a separate canvas or CSS gradient
Returns selected color as hex string
Keyboard-accessible: arrow keys move the selection point
bonus: Input field for manual hex entry
challenges.demo: Render a color picker. Show a preview swatch and the selected hex value. Copy to clipboard on click.

challenges.title: Tree View
challenges.prompt: Build a tree view component for hierarchical data with expand/collapse and keyboard navigation.
required: role='tree', role='treeitem', aria-expanded on expandable items
Arrow Right expands; Arrow Left collapses or moves to parent
Up/Down navigate between visible items
Home/End jump to first/last visible item
bonus: Multi-select with checkboxes and indeterminate state for partial selection
challenges.demo: Render a file system tree (3 levels deep). Expand/collapse folders. Show file/folder icons.

challenges.title: Data Table with Sorting
challenges.prompt: Build a sortable data table with column headers that toggle asc/desc sort order.
required: Sortable columns use aria-sort='ascending' | 'descending' | 'none'
Clicking a header sorts by that column; clicking again reverses order
role='columnheader' on th, role='rowheader' on first td
Shows a sort direction indicator (↑/↓)
challenges.demo: Render a users table (name, email, age, city) with 20 rows. Sort by any column.

challenges.title: Pagination
challenges.prompt: Build a Pagination component with page numbers, prev/next, and first/last navigation.
required: nav element with aria-label='Pagination'
aria-current='page' on the active page button
Prev/Next disabled at first/last page
Ellipsis (...) for large page counts, always showing first and last
bonus: Configurable siblings count (pages shown around current)
challenges.demo: Pair with the sortable table. Add pagination at 10 rows per page with full navigation.

challenges.title: Date Picker
challenges.prompt: Build a date picker with a calendar grid, month navigation, and keyboard support.
required: role='grid' calendar, role='gridcell' on each day
Arrow keys navigate the grid; Enter selects a date
Prev/Next month navigation buttons
aria-label on the current month/year display
Selected date reflected in a controlled input
challenges.demo: Render a date picker input. Clicking opens the calendar. Selecting a date closes it and fills the input (YYYY-MM-DD).

challenges.title: Rich Text Editor (Basic)
challenges.prompt: Build a basic rich text editor using contenteditable with bold, italic, underline, and link support.
required: contenteditable div with role='textbox' and aria-multiline='true'
Toolbar buttons use document.execCommand or Selection API + Range for formatting
Cmd/Ctrl+B for bold, Cmd/Ctrl+I for italic, Cmd/Ctrl+U for underline
Link insertion via a prompt or inline input
bonus: Undo/Redo via history stack (not browser native)
Output raw HTML or a serialized format
challenges.demo: Render a full-width editor with a formatting toolbar. Type text, select it, and apply bold/italic/underline.

challenges.title: Resizable Panels
challenges.prompt: Build a resizable split panel layout with a draggable divider between two panes.
required: Uses pointer events (pointerdown, pointermove, pointerup) with setPointerCapture
Divider constrains each pane to a min/max percentage
Works horizontally and vertically (direction prop)
aria-orientation and aria-valuenow on the separator
bonus: Collapse a pane on double-click of the divider
Animate to a given split ratio via a CSS transition
challenges.demo: Render a code editor layout: file tree (left, resizable) and editor (right). Drag the divider.

challenges.title: Masonry Layout
challenges.prompt: Build a masonry grid layout (like Pinterest) in pure CSS or JS, where items fill columns greedily.
required: Items distributed across N columns with minimum height impact
Responsive: column count changes with container width
No layout thrashing: batches reads and writes
Items maintain DOM order for keyboard/screen reader navigation
bonus: JS approach using ResizeObserver and column height tracking
challenges.demo: Render 20 cards with varying heights (random 100–300px). Show in a responsive 3-column masonry layout.

challenges.title: Skeleton Screen
challenges.prompt: Build a Skeleton loading component that mimics the shape of content while it loads.
required: Renders grey placeholder shapes (lines, circles, rectangles)
aria-busy='true' on the container while loading
aria-label='Loading content' or aria-live region for screen readers
Shimmer animation using CSS gradient animation
challenges.demo: Build a card skeleton that matches a user profile card. Transition from skeleton to real content after 2 seconds.

challenges.title: Stepper / Progress Steps
challenges.prompt: Build a horizontal step progress indicator showing completed, active, and upcoming steps.
required: Each step shows an index, label, and status (complete/active/upcoming)
Connecting lines between steps reflect progress
aria-current='step' on the active step
Completed steps have a checkmark and different visual treatment
bonus: Clickable steps (navigate to any completed step)
challenges.demo: Render a 4-step checkout stepper. Pair with buttons that advance and retreat through steps.

challenges.title: Floating Action Button Menu
challenges.prompt: Build a FAB (Floating Action Button) that expands into a radial or vertical menu of actions.
required: Main button toggles the menu open/closed
Sub-buttons animate in (staggered) and out
aria-expanded on the main button
Each sub-button has an aria-label
Escape closes the menu
bonus: Radial/fan layout option vs vertical stack
Labels that appear on hover of sub-buttons
challenges.demo: Render a FAB in the bottom-right corner with 3 actions: Share, Edit, Delete. Clicking shows an alert.

challenges.title: Sticky Table Header
challenges.prompt: Build a scrollable table with a sticky header that remains visible as the user scrolls the body rows.
required: Table header stays fixed at the top during vertical scroll
Column widths in sticky header match body columns (no layout shift)
Works with a fixed-height scrollable container
Does not use position: sticky (implement with a mirrored header technique or position:sticky with overflow handling)
bonus: Sticky first column for horizontal scroll
Intersection-based shadow under the stuck header
challenges.demo: Render a 50-row, 6-column table inside a 400px container. Header stays visible on scroll.

challenges.title: Searchable Dropdown with Groups
challenges.prompt: Build a dropdown with grouped options and a search box that filters across all groups.
required: Groups use role='group' with aria-label
Search input filters options across groups (case-insensitive)
Empty state when no options match
Arrow keys navigate across group boundaries
Selected value shown in the trigger
bonus: Highlight matching text in option labels
Create new option if no match ('Add X')
challenges.demo: Render a country selector grouped by continent (Europe, Americas, Asia, etc.).

challenges.title: Number Input with Spin Buttons
challenges.prompt: Build an accessible number input with increment/decrement spin buttons following the ARIA spinbutton pattern.
required: role='spinbutton', aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, aria-valuetext
Up/Down arrow keys increment/decrement
Page Up/Down jump by larger step
Home/End jump to min/max
Input accepts typed values and clamps on blur
bonus: Long-press on spin buttons for continuous increment
challenges.demo: Render a quantity selector (1–99) and a temperature input (-50 to 150°C). Show values update live.

challenges.title: Image Carousel
challenges.prompt: Build an image carousel following the ARIA carousel / live region pattern.
required: Prev/Next buttons navigate slides
Dot indicators show current slide and total
aria-label on the carousel, aria-roledescription='carousel' on the container
Each slide has aria-roledescription='slide' and aria-label='N of M'
Autoplay with pause on hover/focus
challenges.demo: Render a 5-image carousel using placeholder images. Show prev/next, dots, and autoplay every 3 seconds.

challenges.title: Animated Counter
challenges.prompt: Build an AnimatedCounter component that smoothly animates a number from its previous value to a new value.
required: Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth interpolation
Easing function (ease-out or spring-like)
Respects prefers-reduced-motion: jumps to final value instantly
Configurable duration prop
Formats large numbers (e.g. 1,000,000)
challenges.demo: Render a dashboard with 4 stat cards (users, revenue, orders, conversion). Click 'Update stats' to animate to new values.
